data.title: Doyen International to Go Private with Galaxy Bond
data.description:
Doyen International Holdings Ltd. (HK:0668) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Doyen International Holdings Ltd. is set to be privatized by Galaxy Bond Holdings Ltd. through a scheme of arrangement, which also involves the proposed withdrawal of Doyen’s listing. The scheme document detailing this proposal has been dispatched to shareholders, containing recommendations from an independent board committee and financial adviser.

For further insights into HK:0668 stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Terrain Minerals Pauses Drilling for Holidays at Wildflower
data.description:
Terrain Minerals Ltd (AU:TMX) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Terrain Minerals Ltd has paused its 2024 RC drilling campaign at the Wildflower Gold Project for the Christmas and New Year holidays, allowing staff and drillers a well-deserved break. The company has completed 8 holes totaling 1,182 meters and plans to resume drilling in early January 2025, with initial results expected the same month. This pause not only prioritizes family time but also emphasizes safety in remote work environments.

For further insights into AU:TMX stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Silver Mines Limited Optimizes Bowdens Silver Project
data.description:
Silver Mines Limited (AU:SVL) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Silver Mines Limited has unveiled an impressive optimization study for its Bowdens Silver Project, highlighting strong economic potential with a 16-year mine life and significant silver output. The project is poised to deliver attractive returns with a projected internal rate of return over 20%, leveraging its status as one of the most silver-price-sensitive operations globally. With 70% of engineering complete, Silver Mines is preparing to advance to the Definitive Feasibility Study and secure necessary permits, promising substantial benefits for both investors and the local community.

For further insights into AU:SVL stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Doyen International Announces Shareholder Court Meeting
data.description:
Doyen International Holdings Ltd. (HK:0668) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Doyen International Holdings Ltd. has announced a court-directed meeting for shareholders to consider a proposed scheme of arrangement. Scheduled for January 17, 2025, this meeting will allow independent shareholders to vote on the scheme, which excludes shares held by Galaxy Bond Holdings Ltd. and its affiliates. Shareholders can attend in person or via an online platform.

data.title: 8VI Holdings to Delist from Australian Exchange
data.description:
8VI Holdings Ltd (AU:8VI) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

8VI Holdings Ltd plans to voluntarily delist from the Australian Securities Exchange, with trading of its CHESS Depositary Interests (CDIs) ceasing on February 10, 2025. Post-delisting, 8VI will continue operations under Singaporean corporate law, and CDI holders will need to decide whether to sell their CDIs before the suspension date or convert them into shares. The delisting marks a strategic shift for 8VI, impacting its ability to raise capital and altering shareholder engagement.

For further insights into AU:8VI stock, check out TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Legend Holdings Renews Coal and Labour Deal with Levima
data.description:
Legend Holdings Corporation Class H (HK:3396) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Legend Holdings Corporation has renewed its agreement for coal and labour outsourcing services with Levima Advanced Materials for 2025. Guozhuang Mining will provide these services with a maximum consideration of RMB366 million, subject to shareholder approval. This move continues their ongoing collaboration, adhering to the Hong Kong Listing Rules for connected transactions.

data.title: OncoSil Medical Strengthens Compliance Amidst Director’s Shareholdings Update
data.description:
OncoSil Medical Ltd (AU:OSL) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

OncoSil Medical Ltd has announced a significant change in the shareholding interests of Director Douglas Cubbin, who acquired an additional 25 million shares and 32.5 million options. The company has identified a previous discrepancy in the directors’ interest disclosures and is implementing enhanced compliance measures to prevent future occurrences. This move reflects OncoSil’s commitment to transparency and adherence to corporate governance standards, potentially influencing investor confidence.
